title: dasyglossum plicigerum
intro: Dasyglossum plicigerum, also known as the alpine club moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dasyglossum plicigerum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Dasyglossum plicigerum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs.
